basics.name: Alex Doe
basics.label: Full-Stack Designer & Developer
basics.summary:
I'm a multidisciplinary designer and developer building thoughtful digital products. I care about craft, accessibility, and the small details that make software feel alive.

What I bring: strategic thinking, attention to detail, empathy, leadership, and commitment. I love working collaboratively, listening, proposing, and building solutions that create value for both people and the project.
